description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a dark exterior, featuring a combination of horizontal siding and large windows. The roof is complex, primarily gabled with intersecting sections and a muted gray color. The front yard includes a driveway leading to a covered entrance, flanked by a car and mature landscaping with trees and shrubs. The backyard is spacious, containing a swimming pool, a swing set, lounge chairs, a patio dining area, and a detached pool house or shed. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some grouped in pairs and others as single panes. The overall design blends modern and traditional elements, with a prominent entryway and ample outdoor amenities.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a dark exterior, gabled roof, and extensive backyard amenities including a pool and patio. The design features a mix of modern and traditional elements, with prominent windows and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, car, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the driveway, and a clear view of the backyard pool and swing set.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard amenities: swimming pool, swing set, patio dining area, lounge chairs, and a detached pool house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional landscaping, and the rear patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical and asymmetrical rows with grouped and single windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a prominent door, small porch, and overhanging roof supported by columns
